summary:
The test still fails—authentication is bypassed using `//api/admin` and `/health/../api/data`. This indicates that the `authMiddleware` patch needs further adjustment to handle all forms of path manipulation, especially redundant or consecutive slashes.

I'll update the middleware to normalize all duplicate slashes in addition to using `path.Clean`. This will match how HTTP servers may interpret URLs and block these bypass vectors.

Let me patch the middleware to also collapse repeated slashes before checking the `/api/` prefix.
